title: Birthday Black & Silver Glitz Ice Fountains - Vibrant & Sparkling Celebration Candles - Perfect for Cakes & Parties - 3ct
features: SHIMMERING GLITZ: Add a touch of magic to your celebrations with our birthday black & silver glitz ice fountains, featuring a vibrant and sparkling design, perfect for creating unforgettable memories on your special day.

SAFETY FIRST: Crafted from high-quality, safe materials, these ice fountains are specifically designed to provide brilliant and steady sparks without causing harm. Add some pizazz to your event without compromising on safety.

IDEAL FOR CAKES & PARTIES: Whether it's a birthday party, anniversary, or a festive gathering, the versatile black & silver glitz ice fountains are the perfect choice to level up your cakes or party decorations.
EASY TO USE: Our ice fountains are incredibly simple to ignite and place on your cake or display, making it quick and effortless to bring an added touch of magic to your party in just a few moments.
IMPROVE YOUR PARTY GAME: Make your event unforgettable with our stylish and eye-catching ice fountains - the guaranteed way to impress your guests and treat your loved ones to a memorable experience.
description: Product Description Make your cake look beautiful and eye-catching with these cake candles featuring a black glittery design fountain. These cake fountains will make your party cake memorable. Safety Warning Keep away from flammable materials, do not leave unattended, monitor burn time, and properly dispose of remnants.
